old_value: {"id":"CF-LIBS-improved-9g4","title":"Expand Boltzmann fitting section with thorough derivation","description":"The five-dot-product accumulator section in the paper is one of the main advances but is inadequately explained. old_value: {"id":"CF-LIBS-improved-6wz","title":"End-to-End CF-LIBS Pipeline Implementation and Benchmarks","description":"Implement and benchmark the complete CF-LIBS pipeline: round-trip validation, manifold generation, and hybrid inference.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"squires.b@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-25T17:48:02Z","created_by":"TheFermiSea","updated_at":"2026-03-25T17:48:02Z"}

new_value:
{"acceptance_criteria":"- [ ] Round-trip validation passes targets (<5% T error, <20% ne error)
- [ ] Manifold generation succeeds for 10k+ spectra and FAISS index builds
- [ ] Hybrid Inference yields <10ms latency after JIT warmup
- [ ] Integration tests pass via pytest","design":"Phase 1: Implement benchmark_round_trip.py with IterativeCFLIBSSolver on a parameter grid (T: 6000-12000K, ne: 1e16-3e17 cm-3, 3 mixtures) + NoiseModel.
Phase 2: Generate Manifold using ManifoldGenerator (Fe, Cu, Si, Al, Ca, Ti), T=0.5-2eV, ne=1e16-1e18, 4096 px. Build FAISS IVFFlat/Flat index.
Phase 3: Hybrid Manifold+Gradient benchmark vs Iterative vs Manifold-only vs Gradient-only on real and synthetic spectra. Measure latency/convergence.
Phase 4: Build Integration Tests under tests/test_e2e_pipeline.py."}
old_value: {"id":"CF-LIBS-improved-6wz","title":"End-to-End CF-LIBS Pipeline Implementation and Benchmarks","description":"Implement and benchmark the complete CF-LIBS pipeline: round-trip validation, manifold generation, and hybrid inference.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"squires.b@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-25T17:48:02Z","created_by":"TheFermiSea","updated_at":"2026-03-25T17:48:57Z"}
